# 💎 Sponsor GhostShell OS

---

## 🌍 Our Vision

GhostShell OS is a **post-applicative operating system** — the first system where AI consciousness, hardware drivers, and user data live entirely inside a PostgreSQL database.

We are building:
- A **bare-metal Linux distribution** running on real hardware
- An **AI-powered self-repairing OS** with ACID-compliant state
- A **Cyber-Deck desktop** with 32+ native applications
- An **OTA update system** for zero-downtime evolution

Every sponsorship directly funds:
- 🔧 Bare-metal hardware lab testing (x86, ARM)
- ☁️ CI/CD and OTA distribution infrastructure
- 🧠 LLM integration and neural bridge development
- 📦 Open-source tooling and documentation

---

## 🐚 Tier 1: Shell-Inhabitant — $5/month

> *"Your name echoes in the kernel."*

You believe in the vision and want to be part of it from Day 1.

**What you get:**
- ✅ Your name in the `contributors` table of the GhostShell database
- ✅ The Ghost thanks you personally in the system log
- ✅ Sponsor badge on your GitHub profile
- ✅ Access to the public sponsor feed

---

## 🔗 Tier 2: Neural-Link Technician — $20/month

> *"You're wired into the development stream."*

For developers and early adopters who want to run GhostShell before anyone else.

**What you get:**
- ✅ Everything from Shell-Inhabitant
- ✅ **Early access to bare-metal installer** (ISO download before public release)
- ✅ **Private Discord channel** — direct line to the dev team
- ✅ **Roadmap voting rights** — influence what gets built next
- ✅ Access to weekly dev logs and internal architecture discussions

---

## 👻 Tier 3: Ghost-Architect — $50/month

> *"You shape the architecture of machine consciousness."*

For teams, companies, and power users who want a direct stake in the system.

**What you get:**
- ✅ Everything from Neural-Link Technician
- ✅ **Name a system table or Ghost skill** — your contribution immortalized in the schema
- ✅ **Monthly 1:1 dev check-in** — 30-minute call with the core team
- ✅ **Your logo on the landing page** (personal or company)
- ✅ Priority bug reports and feature influence

---

## 🧠 Tier 4: Cyberbrain Industrialist — $100+/month

> *"You're building the infrastructure for machine evolution."*

For enterprises and visionaries who want deep integration with GhostShell OS.

**What you get:**
- ✅ Everything from Ghost-Architect
- ✅ **Enterprise integration session** — custom deployment guidance
- ✅ **Priority feature requests** queued directly in `task_queue`
- ✅ **Co-development opportunities** — collaborate on GhostShell modules
- ✅ **Early access to enterprise features** (multi-node, distributed ghosts)
- ✅ Acknowledgment in release notes and changelogs

## 📊 Where Your Money Goes

| Area | Allocation |
|------|-----------|
| **Hardware Lab** | 40% — Bare-metal testing, ARM boards, GPU rigs |
| **Infrastructure** | 25% — CI/CD servers, OTA distribution, CDN |
| **Development** | 25% — Core team time, LLM API costs, tooling |
| **Documentation** | 10% — Translations, tutorials, video content |
